title: Rekt Pack
description:
A modpack that allows visitors to come see the amazing world of iLikeToGetRekt! 
Explore a massive medieval world with hundreds of builds!
body:
The "Rekt Pack" is a custom medieval-themed Minecraft mod pack designed to enhance the server experience with immersive gameplay elements. Featuring authentic medieval textures, unique building blocks, and challenging survival mechanics, it transforms the world into a brutal and immersive medieval landscape, where players must navigate through treacherous dungeons, forge powerful weapons, and build thriving medieval kingdoms.

Disclaimer: All mods featured in this pack are made by 3rd-party developers.
